questionHtml:
The surface temperature of the star Epsilon Indi is 4600 K.

Describe the stages in the evolution of Epsilon Indi from the point when it leaves the main sequence until its final stable state.

meta.title: Describe the stages in the evolution of Epsilon Indi from the point when it leaves the main sequence until its final stable state.
breadcrumbLabels: D.2 – Stellar characteristics and stellar evolution
